caption: Client Application
description: The Client Application object describes the software application that initiated a request or connection. This provides richer context than user-agent string parsing for identifying client software in API calls, web requests, and service interactions.
name: client_application

name.description: The name of the client application. For example: Postman, curl, AWS CLI.

type.description: The type of client application, normalized to the caption of the type_id value. In the case of Other, it is defined by the source.

type_id.description: The normalized client application type identifier.

3.caption: SDK
3.description: A software development kit or library.

7.caption: API Client
7.description: A dedicated API client or testing tool.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the client application. For example, an OAuth client ID or registered application ID.

vendor_name.description: The vendor of the client application.

version.description: The version of the client application.
